content: Initially, there are 9 puppies, and with 12 more brought in, there are a total of 21 puppies. If 3 puppies are adopted at a time, it would take 7 rounds of adoption (21 ÷ 3 = 7) to adopt all the puppies. The total time for all to be adopted would depend on the frequency of adoptions, which isn't specified.
raw_content: Initially, there are 9 puppies, and with 12 more brought in, there are a total of 21 puppies. If 3 puppies are adopted at a time, it would take 7 rounds of adoption (21 ÷ 3 = 7) to adopt all the puppies. The total time for all to be adopted would depend on the frequency of adoptions, which isn't specified.
